zh.lifeSummary: 當John de La Warre於大約1226年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Jordan de La Warre51歲，母親Mrs. Jordan de la Warre48歲。他與Olympia de Folkington結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1277年5月27日之後在英國薩默塞特布利斯林頓，埋葬在英國布里斯托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de La Warre于大约1226年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Jordan de La Warre51岁，母亲Mrs. Jordan de la Warre48岁。他与Olympia de Folkington结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1277年5月27日之后在英国薩默塞特布利斯林頓，埋葬在英国布里斯托。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Warre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Warr
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for a warrior, usually from Norman French were, werre, waire, warre (central French guerre) ‘war, battle’, and short for de la werre (de la guerre, see Delaware ), literally ‘(man) of the war’, a construction paralleled in de la Bataille (see Battle ). Occasionally it is a shortened form of Old French werreur ‘warrior’.

variants.name: Ware
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by or looked after a dam or weir on a river (from Old English wær, wer, Middle English war(e), warre, wer(e), werre ‘weir’), or a habitational name from a place called with this word, such as Weare (Somerset), Weare Giffard (Devon), or Ware (Hertfordshire).
topographic name for someone who lived by a horse pond or fish pond, from Anglo-Norman French, Middle English wayour, which became early modern English ware, wear.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When John de La Warre was born about 1226, in Gloucestershire, England, his father, Jordan de La Warre, was 51 and his mother, Mrs. Jordan de la Warre, was 48. He married Olympia de Folkington. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died after 27 May 1277, in Brislington, Somerset, England, and was buried in Bristol, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de La Warre est né environ 1226, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Jordan de La Warre, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Jordan de la Warre, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Olympia de Folkington. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 27 mai 1277, à Brislington, Somerset, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Bristol, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de La Warre um 1226 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jordan de La Warre 51 und seine Mutter Mrs. Jordan de la Warre 48. Er hat Olympia de Folkington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 27. Mai 1277 in Brislington, Somerset, England und wurde in Bristol, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de La Warre è nato il circa 1226 nel Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Jordan de La Warre, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Jordan de la Warre, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Olympia de Folkington. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 27 maggio 1277, nel Brislington, Somerset, England, e fu sepolto a Bristol, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de La Warreが約1226年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Jordan de La Warreは51歳，母Mrs. Jordan de la Warreは48歳であった。Olympia de Folkingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1277年5月27日以後にイギリスソメルセトブリスリントンで死去し，イギリスブリストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de La Warre(이)가 대략 1226년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jordan de La Warre(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Jordan de la Warre(은)는 48세였다. 그는 Olympia de Folkington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1277년 5월 27일 이후 영국 서머세트 브리슬링턴에서 사망했으며 영국 브리스톨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de La Warre nasceu aproximadamente 1226, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Jordan de La Warre, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Jordan de la Warre, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Olympia de Folkington. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 27 de maio de 1277, em Brislington, Somerset, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Bristol, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de La Warre родился около 1226 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Jordan de La Warre было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Jordan de la Warre, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Olympia de Folkington. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер после 27 май 1277 г. в местности брислингтон, сомирсет, Англия и был похоронен в местности бристол, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de La Warre nació aproximadamente 1226, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Jordan de La Warre, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Mrs. Jordan de la Warre, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Olympia de Folkington. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió después de 27 de mayo de 1277, en Brislington, Somerset, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Bristol, Inglaterra.
